explicit_text: I am LeRoy Homer, the First Officer of Flight 93. I grew up on Long Island, New York, where I developed a passion for flying and earned my private pilot's license at 16. After graduating from the United States Air Force Academy in 1987, I served in Operations Desert Shield and Desert Storm and flew humanitarian missions to Somalia. I began my career with United Airlines in 1995 while continuing to serve in the United States Air Force Reserve, reaching the rank of Major. My wife and I settled in Marlton, New Jersey, where our first child was born in 2000.
